pattern: Householder Transformation EXACT TWIN (PAID ViT) + Head-wise Shareable Attention DirectShare/PostShare + Walsh-Hadamard fixed orthogonal head coupling + LESTD shared orthonormal head subspace

honest_audit.borderline_notes: TWIN-PLANE-HEAD's Householder W_B = (I-2nn^T) W_A is the SAME operator class as PAID Householder ViT adaptation. PAID applies it per layer for global rotation; TWIN-PLANE-HEAD applies it per head-pair for null-space mirror twin. Mechanism shared; specific use case distinct but not enough to overcome 0.92 functional hit.
